articles.title: VPD seeks suspect after unprovoked assault involving a skateboard at Marpole bus stop
articles.description: The Vancouver Police Department says it is investigating after an unprovoked assault involving a longboard-style skateboard at a bus stop in Marpole.

articles.title: Former Manitoba MP charged after 439 firearms, antique cannon seized by police
articles.description: A former federal politician in Manitoba is facing charges after police say a stockpile of weapons, including an antique cannon, were seized from a home in Dauphin last week. articles.title: Regulated iGaming market goes live in Alberta
